svg.text: Static Ray Cluster V1 - Phase 1 Architecture
Current design and implementation: first-class StaticNodeCluster/StaticNode, node components, raw exporter metrics, dashboard resource status
Resource derivation, planning, reconcile and status aggregation
SSH + Docker components reconciled per node
Designed but not in phase 1 implementation
Phase 1 keeps raw exporter metrics only.
Controller / Engine / Ray metric alignment is later.
